etymology.description: 目(目) (mù, "eye") + 㚔 (handcuff) -> originally depicts 'to pick with eyes'
etymology.interpretation: The character 睪(睪) was formed by adding 目(目) (mù, "eye") to 㚔 (handcuff) to emphasize the action of picking or selecting using visual inspection, relating to the etymological sense of looking or gazing.
